name: Forged In Fury
short_description: This is a strategic, chaotic and casual game where you earn scrap by defeating tanks. In the workshop, you can upgrade your tank, so you can progress further next time!
detailed_description:
In this game, your objective is to destroy tanks and collect their scrap. Tanks spawn in a wave based system, so you can memorize when and where different tanks spawn. After each round, upgrade your tank using said scrap. The more you upgrade, the longer you can progress in your next try. Each upgrade also gives the tank a visual upgrade.

After killing bosses, you can progress to a new zone, and you are able to buy special abilities that can further help you defeat the tanks. You will also unlock new paint jobs for your tank, so you can reclaim the lands in style!
